'''''Challenge'' 49''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1991]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Dandrian's Ring (adventure)|Dandrian's Ring]]" and was written by [[Chris Hind]].
